note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Left buttock wound site, rates 8/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Stage 2 pressure ulcer Left buttock measures 3.3 cm x 2.5 cm x 0.3 cm.
  Wound bed: 60% slough, 40% granulation tissue. Periwound: intact.
  Drainage: none. Odor: none.
Assessment: Stage 2 pressure ulcer Left buttock — improving.
Plan: Foam dressing change daily. Nutritional consult ordered.
